summary: Iteration 179: Auth flow testing completed successfully. Verified Google Auth retry logic fix (5 attempts with delays [0,1,2,3,5s]), error UI with retry buttons, email/password login, protected route redirects, and dashboard access. All 12 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend retry logic correctly implements 5 attempts with delays [0,1,2,3,5s] for Emergent API
Frontend AuthCallback makes single call with 30s timeout to allow backend retries
Error UI correctly shows 'Sign In Failed' with 'Try Google Sign In Again' and 'Back to Home' buttons
Google Sign In button href correctly points to auth.emergentagent.com with redirect URL
Protected routes correctly redirect to landing page when not authenticated
Email/password login working correctly with session_token returned
/api/auth/me endpoint returns user data including terms_accepted field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 179 verified auth flow fixes. Key findings: (1) Backend retry logic working - 5 attempts with delays [0,1,2,3,5s] logged in backend, (2) Frontend error UI shows 'Sign In Failed' with retry buttons when auth fails, (3) Email/password login returns session_token, (4) /api/auth/me returns user data with terms_accepted, (5) Protected routes redirect to landing when unauthenticated, (6) Google Sign In button href correctly points to auth.emergentagent.com. Test credentials: djkingy79@gmail.com / Grubbygrub88

auth_login.POST /api/auth/login (valid): PASS - returns session_token and user data

frontend.protected_route_redirect: PASS - /dashboard redirects to / when not authenticated
